subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of holiness which have been sent down in truth from the dominion of God, the Most High, the Most Great, and within each letter thereof lies concealed a mystery [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات القدس نزلت بالحق من جبروت الله العلی العظیم و فی کل حرف منها ستر
subcodes.subjects: @mystical themes, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @wisdom [hikmat], @call to action, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
